name: MetricCardSeven
description: Metric card with large accent value, title, and feature list with checkmarks.
details: Use for metrics with supporting bullet points. Layout: Large Value (9xl accent, h3) → Title (2xl) → Accent border divider → Feature List (PricingFeatureList with checkmarks). Value and title at top, feature list at bottom with border separator. Best for metrics that need additional context or supporting details. Automatically switches between grid (1-4 items) and carousel (5+ items). Optional header with title, description, tag, and buttons.

description.example: Key metrics that showcase our growth

value.note: Large metric value displayed at top of card in accent color

items.note: Array of supporting bullet points displayed with checkmarks

propsSchema.metrics: Array<{ id: string, value: string, title: string, items: string[] }>
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageWrapperClassName?: string - For styling image wrapper in inline-image layout
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageClassName?: string - For styling images in inline-image layout
propsSchema.valueClassName?: string - For styling the large metric value
propsSchema.metricTitleClassName?: string - For styling the metric title text
propsSchema.featuresClassName?: string - For styling the PricingFeatureList container
propsSchema.featureItemClassName?: string - For styling individual feature items

usageExample: <MetricCardSeven metrics={[{ id: '1', value: '15+', title: 'Years in business consulting', items: ['8+ industries served', '5+ countries reached'] }, { id: '2', value: '500+', title: 'Projects completed', items: ['98% client satisfaction', 'Award-winning designs'] }]} title="Our Impact" description="Key metrics that showcase our growth" textboxLayout="default" animationType="slide-up" useInvertedBackground={false} />
